query:
SELECT 
  o.id,
  o.order_number,
  o.customer_id,
  o.total_amount,
  oi.id as item_id,
  oi.product_id,
  oi.product_name,
  oi.product_sku,
  oi.order_mode,
  oi.fob_quantity,
  oi.fob_unit_price,
  oi.fob_total_price
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id
WHERE o.order_number = 'ORD-20260217-FWY'
ORDER BY o.id DESC, oi.id;
